title: Audit gem and lock health
description: Read the Gemfile and Gemfile.lock and report uncommitted locks, loose constraints, and risky monkey-patch gems.
body: Use when asked whether a Ruby project's dependencies are sound. Actions: read the Gemfile and Gemfile.lock, confirm the lock is committed for an application, inspect constraints for overly loose ranges or conflicts, and note gems known to monkey-patch core classes on load. Do not assume the lock matches the Gemfile without checking bundle. Report and record each uncommitted lock, risky constraint, and global-patching gem with its location. This skill is read-only and must not run bundle update without runtime permission. Validation signals include confirming bundle install reproduces gems from the lock with no drift. Risk boundary: flag a missing committed lock as a reproducibility defect and a core-patching gem as a behavior-change risk to review.
